meta_desc: Complete open-air cinema packages: inflatable screen, video projector, sound system and accessories. A turnkey solution for 50 to 500 spectators.
photo_alt: A fully organised open-air cinema screening: an inflatable Hallucine screen, deckchairs and an audience
hero_desc: Instead of putting your equipment together piece by piece, choose a complete package: screen, projector, sound system and accessories all in one solution, with a single point of contact.
intro_title: Everything you need for your project, with no assembly required
intro_desc: A screen alone isn’t enough to set up a screening. Our packages combine an inflatable screen with projection and sound equipment tailored to the size of your audience — a complete, ready-to-use solution.
packs_title: Three packages to suit your event
petit_desc: Ideal for private parties, gardens and small gatherings.
moyen_desc: For community, charity and corporate events.
grand_desc: For festivals, public screenings and large gatherings.
prix_caption: Price excluding VAT — screen, projector and sound included.
note: Indicative prices (excluding VAT) for a complete package. The video projector and sound system will be tailored to your venue and audience — full details will be confirmed in the quote.
cta_desc: Tell us about your event: we’ll put together a package to suit your needs and send you a detailed quote.
